name: Coconut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and mix thoroughly.
3. Incorporate the vanilla, salt, evaporated milk, and water into the mixture.
4. Gradually sift in the flour, baking powder, and additional coconut, mixing alternately with the liquid ingredients to form a dough.
5. Chill the dough for several hours.
6. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/2 inch thickness.
7. Cut into desired shapes using a floured cutter.
8. Place the cookies on an oiled baking sheet.
9. Bake in a hot oven (420°F) for about 10 minutes.
72 servings. Mrs. L.H. McConnell, North Vernon, IN.
